mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, patient_id, encounter_id, report_source, report_date, file_id, parse_status, summary, conclusion, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM genetic_report WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO genetic_report ( tenant_id, patient_id, encounter_id, report_source, report_date, file_id, parse_status, summary, conclusion ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{patientId}, #{encounterId}, #{reportSource}, #{reportDate}, #{fileId}, #{parseStatus}, #{summary}, #{conclusion} )
mapper.update: UPDATE genetic_report SET patient_id = #{patientId}, encounter_id = #{encounterId}, report_source = #{reportSource}, report_date = #{reportDate}, file_id = #{fileId}, parse_status = #{parseStatus}, summary = #{summary}, conclusion = #{conclusion} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
